title: PRÄSENT C.E. Pattberg SATIN bordeaux gift ribbon, 27 yards for Wrapping Gifts, 1 inch width, Ribbon for Decorating & Crafting, Decorative Ribbon for Gifts, for every occasion
features: A DECORATION ESSENTIAL: The single-coloured satin ribbon is thin and fancy and creates a pretty highlight in no time – whether it's for table decoration purposes or you wish to make a bow for your wrapped gifts, there is a large selection of colours for every event to choose from.

WRAP ARTIST: Design and easily create the perfect little gift for your best friend, partner, mum, dad, uncle, aunt, your children or favourite colleague – the silky ribbon can be nicely bound and decorated.
MADE IN GERMANY: We use 100% recycled materials for our plastic reels, while our production process is based on sustainable green electricity and REACH compliant materials.

FOR EVERY OCCASION: Whether it's for a birthday, baptism, communion, Christmas, wedding anniversary, New Year's, or for even Easter – the fabulous dusty rose accessory quickly makes present wrappings beautiful and eye-catching.
EXCELLENT PRICE-PERFORMANCE RATIO: You receive one roll of SATIN ribbon in bordeaux 27 yards, ribbon in 1 inch width from C.E. Pattberg, made in Germany.
description: From the manufacturer From decorative or gift ribbons to elegant bows: C.E. PATTBERG offers the right material for wrapping and decorating. The ribbons are perfect for making beautifully wrapped gifts and magical decorations for various celebrations, such as weddings and Christmas. Our extensive know-how makes us one of the most versatile manufacturers, for gift and decoration ribbons of the highest quality, which is known far beyond the borders of Germany. C.E. Pattberg gift ribbon, single-coloured decorative ribbon SATIN for classy decorations Whether it's for a wedding, baptism, communion, or Christmas – with SATIN gift ribbons from C.E. Pattberg, every gift and table decoration becomes really pretty and a stylish eye-catcher at the next celebration. The satin ribbon is available in various widths and is suitable for all your craft ideas. While the wide ribbons can be used to create beautiful bows for floral decorations and gifts in no time, the thin decorative ribbons are ideal for decorating invitations and door decorations. a stylish ornament for communions, anniversaries, weddings and much more ideal for decorating & packaging REACH compliant and made in Germany 6 different widths, 34 different colours C.E. Pattberg offers wide, thin, robust, shiny, colourful and plain gift and decoration ribbons for every celebration and every handicraft idea. Elegant table runners and individual bows can be made with them in no time at all. With the satin ribbons you can create attractive gifts for friends and family or decorate wedding invitations and flower arrangements – 6 different widths and 34 different colours allow many creations. During production, 100% recycled materials are used to create the plastic reels.
